scripts.vendor:copy: mkdir -p public/vendor/jquery public/vendor/bootstrap public/vendor/jquery-easing && cp node_modules/jquery/dist/jquery.min.js public/vendor/jquery/jquery.min.js && cp node_modules/bootstrap/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js public/vendor/bootstrap/bootstrap.bundle.min.js && cp node_modules/jquery.easing/jquery.easing.min.js public/vendor/jquery-easing/jquery.easing.min.js
